title: HP-F8: Components and Mechanisms of Signal Transduction (Lab and Seminar) (Practical Course with Student Seminars; Major Cancer Biology @ DKFZ)
further_info: HP-F8: Components and Mechanisms of Signal Transduction Type: Practical Course with Student Seminars Date: 27 April – 22 May 2026 (no course in 4-8 May) Locations: DKFZ Main Building division labs; DKFZ Teaching Lab Hosts/Supervisors: Tobias Dick (t.dick@dkfz.de); Haikun Liu (l.haikun@dkfz.de); Ursula Klingmüller (u.klingmueller@dkfz.de), Marcel Schilling (m.schilling@dkfz.de), Annalisa Addante (annalisa.addante@dkfz-heidelberg.de); and co-workers
